revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:October 18 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of October 18 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦10月18日'''は[[旧暦]][[10月 (旧暦)|10月]]の18日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。
== できごと == * [[文治]]元年（[[1185年]]_月_日） - [[後白河法皇]]が、[[源義経]]に[[源頼朝|頼朝]]追討の院宣を下す * [[永禄]]11年（[[1568年]]_月_日） - [[織田信長]]に支援された[[足利義昭]]が[[室町幕府]]第15代将軍に就任 * [[明治]]3年（[[1870年]]_月_日） - [[岩崎弥太郎]]が九十九商会を設立。後の三菱商会 * [[明治]]3年（[[1870年]]_月_日） - 府県物産表に関する太政官布告が公布
== 誕生日 == * [[明治]]3年（[[1870年]]_月_日） - [[鈴木大拙]]、仏教思想家（+ [[1966年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[慶長]]7年（[[1602年]][[12月1日]]） - [[小早川秀秋]]、[[武将]]（* [[1582年]]） * [[慶長]]15年（[[1610年]][[12月3日]]） - [[本多忠勝|本多平八郎忠勝]]、[[大名]]・[[徳川四天王]]の一人（* [[1548年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[10月17日 (旧暦)|10月17日]] 翌日[[10月19日 (旧暦)|10月19日]] - 前月[[9月18日 (旧暦)|9月18日]] 翌月[[11月18日 (旧暦)|11月18日]] *新暦[[10月18日]]
{{msg:stub}}

{{旧暦360日}} *前日[[10月17日 (旧暦)|10月17日]] 翌日[[10月19日 (旧暦)|10月19日]] - 前月[[9月18日 (旧暦)|9月18日]] 翌月[[11月18日 (旧暦)|11月18日]] *新暦[[10月18日]]

{{旧暦10月}} '''旧暦10月18日'''は[[10月 (旧暦)|旧暦10月]]の18日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。
== できごと == * [[文治]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1185年]][[11月11日]]） - [[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]]が、[[源義経]]に[[源頼朝|頼朝]]追討の院宣を下す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[永禄]]11年（ユリウス暦[[1568年]][[11月7日]]） - [[織田信長]]に支援された[[足利義昭]]が[[室町幕府]]第15代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]に就任 * [[明治]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1870年]][[11月11日]]） - [[岩崎弥太郎]]が九十九商会を設立。後の[[三菱財閥|三菱商会]]
== 誕生日 == * [[文禄]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1595年]][[11月19日]]） - [[毛利秀就]]、[[長州藩]]第2代藩主（+ [[1651年]]） * 明治3年（グレゴリオ暦1870年11月11日） - [[鈴木大拙]]、[[仏教]][[思想家]]（+ [[1966年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[慶長]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1602年]][[12月1日]]） - [[小早川秀秋]]、[[武将]]（* [[1582年]]） * [[慶長]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1610年]][[12月3日]]） - [[本多忠勝]]、[[大名]]・[[徳川四天王]]の一人（* [[1548年]]） * [[宝永]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1710年]][[12月8日]]） - [[津軽信政]]、[[弘前藩]]主（* [[1646年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|17|10|19|9|18|11|10|1018}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:10月18日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]]

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:旧暦10月]] to [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{旧暦10月}} '''旧暦10月18日'''は[[10月 (旧暦)|旧暦10月]]の18日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。
== できごと == * [[文治]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1185年]][[11月11日]]） - [[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]]が、[[源義経]]に[[源頼朝|頼朝]]追討の院宣を下す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[永禄]]11年（ユリウス暦[[1568年]][[11月7日]]） - [[織田信長]]に支援された[[足利義昭]]が[[室町幕府]]第15代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]に就任 * [[明治]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1870年]][[11月11日]]） - [[岩崎弥太郎]]が九十九商会を設立。後の[[三菱財閥|三菱商会]]
== 誕生日 == * [[文禄]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1595年]][[11月19日]]） - [[毛利秀就]]、[[長州藩]]第2代藩主（+ [[1651年]]） * 明治3年（グレゴリオ暦1870年11月11日） - [[鈴木大拙]]、[[仏教]][[思想家]]（+ [[1966年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[慶長]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1602年]][[12月1日]]） - [[小早川秀秋]]、[[武将]]（* [[1582年]]） * [[慶長]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1610年]][[12月3日]]） - [[本多忠勝]]、[[大名]]・[[徳川四天王]]の一人（* [[1548年]]） * [[宝永]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1710年]][[12月8日]]） - [[津軽信政]]、[[弘前藩]]主（* [[1646年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|17|10|19|9|18|11|10|1018}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:10月18日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]]

== 忌日 == * [[慶長]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1602年]][[12月1日]]） - [[小早川秀秋]]、[[武将]]（* [[1582年]]） * [[慶長]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1610年]][[12月3日]]） - [[本多忠勝]]、[[大名]]・[[徳川四天王]]の一人（* [[1548年]]） * [[宝永]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1710年]][[12月8日]]） - [[津軽信政]]、[[弘前藩]]主（* [[1646年]]）

revision.text:
{{Lunar October}} '''Lunar October18日'''は[[10月 (旧暦)|Lunar October]]の18日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。
== できごと == * [[文治]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1185年]][[11月11日]]） - [[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]]が、[[源義経]]に[[源頼朝|頼朝]]追討の院宣を下す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[永禄]]11年（ユリウス暦[[1568年]][[11月7日]]） - [[織田信長]]に支援された[[足利義昭]]が[[室町幕府]]第15代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]に就任 * [[明治]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1870年]][[11月11日]]） - [[岩崎弥太郎]]が九十九商会を設立。後の[[三菱財閥|三菱商会]]
== 誕生日 == * [[文禄]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1595年]][[11月19日]]） - [[毛利秀就]]、[[長州藩]]第2代藩主（+ [[1651年]]） * 明治3年（グレゴリオ暦1870年11月11日） - [[鈴木大拙]]、[[仏教]][[思想家]]（+ [[1966年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[慶長]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1602年]][[12月1日]]） - [[小早川秀秋]]、[[武将]]（* [[1582年]]） * [[慶長]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1610年]][[12月3日]]） - [[本多忠勝]]、[[大名]]・[[徳川四天王]]の一人（* [[1548年]]） * [[宝永]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1710年]][[12月8日]]） - [[津軽信政]]、[[弘前藩]]主（* [[1646年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|17|10|19|9|18|11|10|1018}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:10月18日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]]

lets hope this actually works
Text replacement - "}}↵'''Lunar" to "}} ''{{subst:PAGENAME}}<!--Lunar"
Text replacement - "日'''は" to "--> is the Nth day of "

'''October 18 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar October}} ''October 18'''<!--Lunar October18--> is the Nth day of [[10月 (旧暦)|Lunar October]]の18日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]][[Category:先負]]である。

== 忌日 == * [[慶長]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1602年]][[12月1日]]） - [[小早川秀秋]]、[[武将]]（* [[1582年]]） * [[慶長]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1610年]][[12月3日]]） - [[本多忠勝]]、[[大名]]・[[徳川四天王]]の一人（* [[1548年]]） * [[宝永]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1710年]][[12月8日]]） - [[津軽信政]]、[[弘前藩]]主（* [[1646年]]）

revision.comment: making the comments bigger
revision.text:
{{Lunar October}} '''October 18 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
<!--== {{Lunar October}} ''October 18'''<!--Lunar October18 is the Nth day of [[10月 (旧暦)|Lunar October]]の18日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]][[Category:先負]]である。
--> == Events == * [[文治]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1185年]][[11月11日]]） - [[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]]が、[[源義経]]に[[源頼朝|頼朝]]追討の院宣を下す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[永禄]]11年（ユリウス暦[[1568年]][[11月7日]]） - [[織田信長]]に支援された[[足利義昭]]が[[室町幕府]]第15代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]に就任 * [[明治]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1870年]][[11月11日]]） - [[岩崎弥太郎]]が九十九商会を設立。後の[[三菱財閥|三菱商会]]
== Births == * [[文禄]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1595年]][[11月19日]]） - [[毛利秀就]]、[[長州藩]]第2代藩主（+ [[1651年]]） * 明治3年（グレゴリオ暦1870年11月11日） - [[鈴木大拙]]、[[仏教]][[思想家]]（+ [[1966年]]）
== Deaths == * [[慶長]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1602年]][[12月1日]]） - [[小早川秀秋]]、[[武将]]（* [[1582年]]） * [[慶長]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1610年]][[12月3日]]） - [[本多忠勝]]、[[大名]]・[[徳川四天王]]の一人（* [[1548年]]） * [[宝永]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1710年]][[12月8日]]） - [[津軽信政]]、[[弘前藩]]主（* [[1646年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|17|10|19|9|18|11|10|1018}}
[[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[ja:10月18日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:Lunar October]] {{citation needed}}
{{citation needed}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:先負]] [[Category:not Butsumetsu]][[sn:October 18 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:not Butsumetsu]]

<!--== {{Lunar October}} ''October 18'''<!--Lunar October18 is the Nth day of [[10月 (旧暦)|Lunar October]]の18日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]][[Category:先負]]である。
--> == Events == * [[文治]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1185年]][[11月11日]]） - [[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]]が、[[源義経]]に[[源頼朝|頼朝]]追討の院宣を下す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[永禄]]11年（ユリウス暦[[1568年]][[11月7日]]） - [[織田信長]]に支援された[[足利義昭]]が[[室町幕府]]第15代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]に就任 * [[明治]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1870年]][[11月11日]]） - [[岩崎弥太郎]]が九十九商会を設立。後の[[三菱財閥|三菱商会]]
== Births == * [[文禄]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1595年]][[11月19日]]） - [[毛利秀就]]、[[長州藩]]第2代藩主（+ [[1651年]]） * 明治3年（グレゴリオ暦1870年11月11日） - [[鈴木大拙]]、[[仏教]][[思想家]]（+ [[1966年]]）
== Deaths == * [[慶長]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1602年]][[12月1日]]） - [[小早川秀秋]]、[[武将]]（* [[1582年]]） * [[慶長]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1610年]][[12月3日]]） - [[本多忠勝]]、[[大名]]・[[徳川四天王]]の一人（* [[1548年]]） * [[宝永]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1710年]][[12月8日]]） - [[津軽信政]]、[[弘前藩]]主（* [[1646年]]）

--> == Events == * [[文治]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1185年]][[11月11日]]） - [[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]]が、[[源義経]]に[[源頼朝|頼朝]]追討の院宣を下す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[永禄]]11年（ユリウス暦[[1568年]][[11月7日]]） - [[織田信長]]に支援された[[足利義昭]]が[[室町幕府]]第15代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]に就任 * [[明治]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1870年]][[11月11日]]） - [[岩崎弥太郎]]が九十九商会を設立。後の[[三菱財閥|三菱商会]]
== Births == * [[文禄]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1595年]][[11月19日]]） - [[毛利秀就]]、[[長州藩]]第2代藩主（+ [[1651年]]） * 明治3年（グレゴリオ暦1870年11月11日） - [[鈴木大拙]]、[[仏教]][[思想家]]（+ [[1966年]]）
== Deaths == * [[慶長]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1602年]][[12月1日]]） - [[小早川秀秋]]、[[武将]]（* [[1582年]]） * [[慶長]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1610年]][[12月3日]]） - [[本多忠勝]]、[[大名]]・[[徳川四天王]]の一人（* [[1548年]]） * [[宝永]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1710年]][[12月8日]]） - [[津軽信政]]、[[弘前藩]]主（* [[1646年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{旧暦360日|10|17|10|19|9|18|11|10|1018}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
== Events == * [[文治]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1185]][[11月11日]]） - [[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]]が、[[源義経]]に[[源頼朝|頼朝]]追討の院宣を下す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[永禄]]11年（ユリウス暦[[1568]][[11月7日]]） - [[織田信長]]に支援された[[足利義昭]]が[[室町幕府]]第15代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]に就任 * [[明治]]3年（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1870]][[11月11日]]） - [[岩崎弥太郎]]が九十九商会を設立。後の[[三菱財閥|三菱商会]]
== Births == * [[文禄]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1595]][[11月19日]]） - [[毛利秀就]]、[[長州藩]]第2代藩主（+ [[1651]]） * 明治3年（グレゴリオ暦1870年11月11日） - [[鈴木大拙]]、[[仏教]][[思想家]]（+ [[1966]]）
== Deaths == * [[慶長]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1602]][[12月1日]]） - [[小早川秀秋]]、[[武将]]（* [[1582]]） * [[慶長]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1610]][[12月3日]]） - [[本多忠勝]]、[[大名]]・[[徳川四天王]]の一人（* [[1548]]） * [[宝永]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1710]][[12月8日]]） - [[津軽信政]]、[[弘前藩]]主（* [[1646]]）

revision.comment: Text replacement - "4年（" to "4th year（"
revision.text:
[[sn:October 18 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 18일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月18日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 18일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十八]] [[zh:十月十八]] [[en:draft:October 18 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 18''' is the 18th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
== Events == * [[文治]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1185]][[11月11日]]） - [[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]]が、[[源義経]]に[[源頼朝|頼朝]]追討の院宣を下す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[永禄]]11th year（ユリウス暦[[1568]][[11月7日]]） - [[織田信長]]に支援された[[足利義昭]]が[[室町幕府]]第15代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]に就任 * [[明治]]3rd year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1870]][[11月11日]]） - [[岩崎弥太郎]]が九十九商会を設立。後の[[三菱財閥|三菱商会]]
== Births == * [[文禄]]4th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1595]][[11月19日]]） - [[毛利秀就]]、[[長州藩]]第2代藩主（+ [[1651]]） * 明治3rd year（グレゴリオ暦1870年11月11日） - [[鈴木大拙]]、[[仏教]][[思想家]]（+ [[1966]]）
== Deaths == * [[慶長]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1602]][[12月1日]]） - [[小早川秀秋]]、[[武将]]（* [[1582]]） * [[慶長]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1610]][[12月3日]]） - [[本多忠勝]]、[[大名]]・[[徳川四天王]]の一人（* [[1548]]） * [[宝永]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1710]][[12月8日]]） - [[津軽信政]]、[[弘前藩]]主（* [[1646]]）
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|17|10|19|9|18|11|10|1018}}

revision.text:
[[sn:October 18 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 18일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月18日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 18일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十八]] [[zh:十月十八]] [[en:draft:October 18 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 18''' is the 18th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
== Events == * [[文治]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1185]][[11月11日]]） - [[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]]が、[[源義経]]に[[源頼朝|頼朝]]追討の院宣を下す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[永禄]]11th year（ユリウス暦[[1568]][[11月7日]]） - [[織田信長]]に支援された[[足利義昭]]が[[室町幕府]]第15代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]に就任 * [[明治]]3rd year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1870]][[11月11日]]） - [[岩崎弥太郎]]が九十九商会を設立。後の[[三菱財閥|三菱商会]]
== Births == * [[文禄]]4th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1595]][[11月19日]]） - [[毛利秀就]]、[[長州藩]]第2代藩主（+ [[1651]]） * 明治3rd year（グレゴリオ暦1870年11月11日） - [[鈴木大拙]]、[[仏教]][[思想家]]（+ [[1966]]）
== Deaths == * [[慶長]]7th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1602]][[12月1日]]） - [[小早川秀秋]]、[[武将]]（* [[1582]]） * [[慶長]]15th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1610]][[12月3日]]） - [[本多忠勝]]、[[大名]]・[[徳川四天王]]の一人（* [[1548]]） * [[宝永]]7th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1710]][[12月8日]]） - [[津軽信政]]、[[弘前藩]]主（* [[1646]]）
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|17|10|19|9|18|11|10|1018}}

revision.text:
[[sn:October 18 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 18일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月18日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 18일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十八]] [[zh:十月十八]] [[en:draft:October 18 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 18''' is the 18th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
== Events == * [[文治]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1185]][[11月11日]]） - [[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]]が、[[源義経]]に[[源頼朝|頼朝]]追討の院宣を下す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[永禄]]11th year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1568]][[11月7日]]） - [[織田信長]]に支援された[[足利義昭]]が[[室町幕府]]第15代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]に就任 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]]3rd year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1870]][[11月11日]]） - [[岩崎弥太郎]]が九十九商会を設立。後の[[三菱財閥|三菱商会]]
== Births == * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|文禄}}4th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1595]][[11月19日]]） - [[毛利秀就]]、[[長州藩]]第2代藩主（+ [[1651]]） * 明治3rd year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] 1870年11月11日） - [[鈴木大拙]]、[[仏教]][[思想家]]（+ [[1966]]）
== Deaths == * [[Keichō]]7th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1602]][[12月1日]]） - [[小早川秀秋]]、[[武将]]（* [[1582]]） * [[Keichō]]15th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1610]][[12月3日]]） - [[本多忠勝]]、[[大名]]・[[徳川四天王]]の一人（* [[1548]]） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}}7th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1710]][[12月8日]]） - [[津軽信政]]、[[弘前藩]]主（* [[1646]]）
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|17|10|19|9|18|11|10|1018}}

[[sn:October 18 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 18일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月18日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 18일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十八]] [[zh:十月十八]] [[en:draft:October 18 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 18''' is the 18th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[文治]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1185]] [[11月11日]] ） - [[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]] が、[[源義経]] に[[源頼朝|頼朝]] 追討の院宣を下す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[永禄]] 11th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1568]] [[11月7日]] ） - [[織田信長]] に支援された[[足利義昭]] が[[室町幕府]] 第15代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] に就任 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[11月11日]] ） - [[岩崎弥太郎]] が九十九商会を設立。後の[[三菱財閥|三菱商会]]
== Births == * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|文禄}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1595]] [[11月19日]] ） - [[毛利秀就]] 、[[長州藩]] 第2代藩主（+ [[1651]] ） * 明治3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1870年11月11日） - [[鈴木大拙]] 、[[仏教]] [[思想家]] （+ [[1966]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Keichō]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1602]] [[12月1日]] ） - [[小早川秀秋]] 、[[武将]] （* [[1582]] ） * [[Keichō]] 15th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1610]] [[12月3日]] ） - [[本多忠勝]] 、[[大名]] ・[[徳川四天王]] の一人（* [[1548]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1710]] [[12月8日]] ） - [[津軽信政]] 、[[弘前藩]] 主（* [[1646]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|17|10|19|9|18|11|10|1018}}

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[sn:October 18 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 18일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月18日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 18일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十八]] [[zh:十月十八]] [[en:draft:October 18 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 18''' is the 18th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[文治]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1185]] [[November 11]] ） - [[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]] が、[[源義経]] に[[源頼朝|頼朝]] 追討の院宣を下す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[永禄]] 11th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1568]] [[November 7]] ） - [[織田信長]] に支援された[[足利義昭]] が[[室町幕府]] 第15代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] に就任 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[November 11]] ） - [[岩崎弥太郎]] が九十九商会を設立。後の[[三菱財閥|三菱商会]]
== Births == * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|文禄}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1595]] [[November 19]] ） - [[毛利秀就]] 、[[長州藩]] 第2代藩主（+ [[1651]] ） * 明治3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1870年11月11日） - [[鈴木大拙]] 、[[仏教]] [[思想家]] （+ [[1966]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Keichō]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1602]] [[December 1]] ） - [[小早川秀秋]] 、[[武将]] （* [[1582]] ） * [[Keichō]] 15th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1610]] [[December 3]] ） - [[本多忠勝]] 、[[大名]] ・[[徳川四天王]] の一人（* [[1548]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1710]] [[December 8]] ） - [[津軽信政]] 、[[弘前藩]] 主（* [[1646]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|17|10|19|9|18|11|10|1018}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|" to "{{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|"
revision.text:
[[sn:October 18 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 18일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月18日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 18일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十八]] [[zh:十月十八]] [[en:draft:October 18 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 18''' is the 18th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[文治]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1185]] [[November 11]] ） - [[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]] が、[[源義経]] に[[源頼朝|頼朝]] 追討の院宣を下す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[永禄]] 11th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1568]] [[November 7]] ） - [[織田信長]] に支援された[[足利義昭]] が[[室町幕府]] 第15代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] に就任 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[November 11]] ） - [[岩崎弥太郎]] が九十九商会を設立。後の[[三菱財閥|三菱商会]]
== Births == * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|文禄}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1595]] [[November 19]] ） - [[毛利秀就]] 、[[長州藩]] 第2代藩主（+ [[1651]] ） * 明治3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1870年11月11日） - [[鈴木大拙]] 、[[仏教]] [[思想家]] （+ [[1966]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Keichō]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1602]] [[December 1]] ） - [[小早川秀秋]] 、[[武将]] （* [[1582]] ） * [[Keichō]] 15th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1610]] [[December 3]] ） - [[本多忠勝]] 、[[大名]] ・[[徳川四天王]] の一人（* [[1548]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1710]] [[December 8]] ） - [[津軽信政]] 、[[弘前藩]] 主（* [[1646]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|17|10|19|9|18|11|10|1018}}

revision.comment: Fixing the qq replacement as it causes problems in a lot of pages
revision.text:
[[sn:October 18 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 18일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月18日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 18일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十八]] [[zh:十月十八]] [[en:draft:October 18 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 18''' is the 18th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[文治]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1185]] [[November 11]] ） - [[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]] が、[[源義経]] に[[源頼朝|頼朝]] 追討の院宣を下す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 11th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1568]] [[November 7]] ） - [[織田信長]] に支援された[[足利義昭]] が[[室町幕府]] 第15代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] に就任 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[November 11]] ） - [[岩崎弥太郎]] が九十九商会を設立。後の[[三菱財閥|三菱商会]]
== Births == * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|文禄}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1595]] [[November 19]] ） - [[毛利秀就]] 、[[長州藩]] 第2代藩主（+ [[1651]] ） * 明治3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1870年11月11日） - [[鈴木大拙]] 、[[仏教]] [[思想家]] （+ [[1966]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Keichō]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1602]] [[December 1]] ） - [[小早川秀秋]] 、[[武将]] （* [[1582]] ） * [[Keichō]] 15th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1610]] [[December 3]] ） - [[本多忠勝]] 、[[大名]] ・[[徳川四天王]] の一人（* [[1548]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1710]] [[December 8]] ） - [[津軽信政]] 、[[弘前藩]] 主（* [[1646]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|17|10|19|9|18|11|10|1018}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[文治]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1185]] [[November 11]] ） - [[Emperor Go-Shirakawa|後白河法皇]] が、[[源義経]] に[[源頼朝|頼朝]] 追討の院宣を下す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 11th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1568]] [[November 7]] ） - [[織田信長]] に支援された[[足利義昭]] が[[Ashikaga Shogunate]] 第15代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] に就任 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[November 11]] ） - [[岩崎弥太郎]] が九十九商会を設立。後の[[三菱財閥|三菱商会]]
== Births == * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|文禄}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1595]] [[November 19]] ） - [[毛利秀就]] 、[[長州藩]] 第2代藩主（+ [[1651]] ） * 明治3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1870年11月11日） - [[鈴木大拙]] 、[[仏教]] [[思想家]] （+ [[1966]] ）

[[sn:October 18 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 18일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月18日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 18일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十八]] [[zh:十月十八]] [[en:draft:October 18 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 18''' is the 18th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[文治]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1185]] [[November 11]] ） - [[Emperor Go-Shirakawa|後白河法皇]] が、[[Minamoto no Yoshitsune]] に[[源頼朝|頼朝]] 追討の院宣を下す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 11th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1568]] [[November 7]] ） - [[織田信長]] に支援された[[足利義昭]] が[[Ashikaga Shogunate]] 第15代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] に就任 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[November 11]] ） - [[岩崎弥太郎]] が九十九商会を設立。後の[[三菱財閥|三菱商会]]
== Births == * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|文禄}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1595]] [[November 19]] ） - [[毛利秀就]] 、[[長州藩]] 第2代藩主（+ [[1651]] ） * 明治3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1870年11月11日） - [[鈴木大拙]] 、[[仏教]] [[思想家]] （+ [[1966]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Keichō]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1602]] [[December 1]] ） - [[小早川秀秋]] 、[[武将]] （* [[1582]] ） * [[Keichō]] 15th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1610]] [[December 3]] ） - [[本多忠勝]] 、[[大名]] ・[[徳川四天王]] の一人（* [[1548]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1710]] [[December 8]] ） - [[津軽信政]] 、[[弘前藩]] 主（* [[1646]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|17|10|19|9|18|11|10|1018}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "長州藩" to "Chōshū Domain"
revision.text:
[[sn:October 18 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 18일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月18日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 18일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十八]] [[zh:十月十八]] [[en:draft:October 18 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 18''' is the 18th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[文治]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1185]] [[November 11]] ） - [[Emperor Go-Shirakawa|後白河法皇]] が、[[Minamoto no Yoshitsune]] に[[源頼朝|頼朝]] 追討の院宣を下す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 11th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1568]] [[November 7]] ） - [[織田信長]] に支援された[[足利義昭]] が[[Ashikaga Shogunate]] 第15代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] に就任 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[November 11]] ） - [[岩崎弥太郎]] が九十九商会を設立。後の[[三菱財閥|三菱商会]]
== Births == * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|文禄}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1595]] [[November 19]] ） - [[毛利秀就]] 、[[Chōshū Domain]] 第2代藩主（+ [[1651]] ） * 明治3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1870年11月11日） - [[鈴木大拙]] 、[[仏教]] [[思想家]] （+ [[1966]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Keichō]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1602]] [[December 1]] ） - [[小早川秀秋]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1582]] ） * [[Keichō]] 15th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1610]] [[December 3]] ） - [[本多忠勝]] 、[[大名]] ・[[徳川四天王]] の一人（* [[1548]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1710]] [[December 8]] ） - [[津軽信政]] 、[[弘前藩]] 主（* [[1646]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|17|10|19|9|18|11|10|1018}}

== Births == * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|文禄}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1595]] [[November 19]] ） - [[毛利秀就]] 、[[Chōshū Domain]] 第2代藩主（+ [[1651]] ） * 明治3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1870年11月11日） - [[鈴木大拙]] 、[[仏教]] [[思想家]] （+ [[1966]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Keichō]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1602]] [[December 1]] ） - [[小早川秀秋]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1582]] ） * [[Keichō]] 15th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1610]] [[December 3]] ） - [[本多忠勝]] 、[[大名]] ・[[徳川四天王]] の一人（* [[1548]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1710]] [[December 8]] ） - [[津軽信政]] 、[[弘前藩]] 主（* [[1646]] ）

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[sn:October 18 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 18일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月18日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 18일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十八]] [[zh:十月十八]] [[en:draft:October 18 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 18''' is the 18th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[文治]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1185]] [[November 11]] ） - [[Emperor Go-Shirakawa|後白河法皇]] が、[[Minamoto no Yoshitsune]] に[[源頼朝|頼朝]] 追討の院宣を下す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 11th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1568]] [[November 7]] ） - [[Oda Nobunaga]] に支援された[[Ashikaga Yoshiaki]] が[[Ashikaga Shogunate]] 第15代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] に就任 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[November 11]] ） - [[岩崎弥太郎]] が九十九商会を設立。後の[[三菱財閥|三菱商会]]
== Births == * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|Bunroku}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1595]] [[November 19]] ） - [[毛利秀就]] 、[[Chōshū Domain]] 第2代藩主（+ [[1651]] ） * 明治3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1870年11月11日） - [[鈴木大拙]] 、[[仏教]] [[Thinker]] （+ [[1966]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Keichō]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1602]] [[December 1]] ） - [[小早川秀秋]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1582]] ） * [[Keichō]] 15th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1610]] [[December 3]] ） - [[本多忠勝]] 、[[大名]] ・[[徳川四天王]] の一人（* [[1548]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1710]] [[December 8]] ） - [[津軽信政]] 、[[弘前藩]] 主（* [[1646]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|17|10|19|9|18|11|10|1018}}

== Births == * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|Bunroku}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1595]] [[November 19]] ） - [[毛利秀就]] 、[[Chōshū Domain]] 第2代藩主（+ [[1651]] ） * 明治3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1870年11月11日） - [[鈴木大拙]] 、[[仏教]] [[Thinker]] （+ [[1966]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Keichō]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1602]] [[December 1]] ） - [[小早川秀秋]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1582]] ） * [[Keichō]] 15th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1610]] [[December 3]] ） - [[本多忠勝]] 、[[大名]] ・[[徳川四天王]] の一人（* [[1548]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1710]] [[December 8]] ） - [[津軽信政]] 、[[弘前藩]] 主（* [[1646]] ）

revision.comment: Text replacement - "== See Also ==" to " == See Also! =="
revision.text:
[[sn:October 18 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 18일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月18日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 18일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十八]] [[zh:十月十八]] [[en:draft:October 18 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 18''' is the 18th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[文治]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1185]] [[November 11]] ） - [[Emperor Go-Shirakawa|後白河法皇]] が、[[Minamoto no Yoshitsune]] に[[源頼朝|頼朝]] 追討の院宣を下す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 11th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1568]] [[November 7]] ） - [[Oda Nobunaga]] に支援された[[Ashikaga Yoshiaki]] が[[Ashikaga Shogunate]] 第15代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] に就任 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[November 11]] ） - [[岩崎弥太郎]] が九十九商会を設立。後の[[三菱財閥|三菱商会]]
== Births == * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|Bunroku}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1595]] [[November 19]] ） - [[毛利秀就]] 、[[Chōshū Domain]] 第2代藩主（+ [[1651]] ） * 明治3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1870年11月11日） - [[鈴木大拙]] 、[[仏教]] [[Thinker]] （+ [[1966]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Keichō]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1602]] [[December 1]] ） - [[小早川秀秋]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1582]] ） * [[Keichō]] 15th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1610]] [[December 3]] ） - [[本多忠勝]] 、[[大名]] ・[[徳川四天王]] の一人（* [[1548]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1710]] [[December 8]] ） - [[津軽信政]] 、[[弘前藩]] 主（* [[1646]] ） == See Also! ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|17|10|19|9|18|11|10|1018}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[大名]]" to "[[Daimyo]]"
revision.text:
[[sn:October 18 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 18일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月18日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 18일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十八]] [[zh:十月十八]] [[en:draft:October 18 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 18''' is the 18th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[文治]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1185]] [[November 11]] ） - [[Emperor Go-Shirakawa|後白河法皇]] が、[[Minamoto no Yoshitsune]] に[[源頼朝|頼朝]] 追討の院宣を下す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 11th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1568]] [[November 7]] ） - [[Oda Nobunaga]] に支援された[[Ashikaga Yoshiaki]] が[[Ashikaga Shogunate]] 第15代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] に就任 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[November 11]] ） - [[岩崎弥太郎]] が九十九商会を設立。後の[[三菱財閥|三菱商会]]
== Births == * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|Bunroku}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1595]] [[November 19]] ） - [[毛利秀就]] 、[[Chōshū Domain]] 第2代藩主（+ [[1651]] ） * 明治3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1870th year 11月11日） - [[鈴木大拙]] 、[[仏教]] [[Thinker]] （+ [[1966]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Keichō]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1602]] [[December 1]] ） - [[小早川秀秋]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1582]] ） * [[Keichō]] 15th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1610]] [[December 3]] ） - [[本多忠勝]] 、[[Daimyo]] ・[[徳川四天王]] の一人（* [[1548]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1710]] [[December 8]] ） - [[津軽信政]] 、[[弘前藩]] 主（* [[1646]] ） == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|17|10|19|9|18|11|10|1018}}

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:11]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[sn:October 18 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 18일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月18日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 18일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十八]] [[zh:十月十八]] [[en:draft:October 18 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 18''' is the 18th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[文治]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1185]] [[November 11]] ） - [[Emperor Go-Shirakawa|後白河法皇]] が、[[Minamoto no Yoshitsune]] に[[源頼朝|頼朝]] 追討の院宣を下す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 11th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1568]] [[November 7]] ） - [[Oda Nobunaga]] に支援された[[Ashikaga Yoshiaki]] が[[Ashikaga Shogunate]] 第15代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] に就任 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[November 11]] ） - [[岩崎弥太郎]] が九十九商会を設立。後の[[三菱財閥|三菱商会]]
== Births == * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|Bunroku}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1595]] [[November 19]] ） - [[毛利秀就]] 、[[Chōshū Domain]] 第2代藩主（+ [[1651]] ） * 明治3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1870th year 11月11日） - [[鈴木大拙]] 、[[仏教]] [[Thinker]] （+ [[1966]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Keichō]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1602]] [[December 1]] ） - [[小早川秀秋]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1582]] ） * [[Keichō]] 15th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1610]] [[December 3]] ） - [[本多忠勝]] 、[[Daimyo]] ・[[徳川四天王]] の一人（* [[1548]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1710]] [[December 8]] ） - [[津軽信政]] 、[[弘前藩]] 主（* [[1646]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|17|10|19|9|18|11|10|1018}}

revision.text:
[[sn:October 18 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 18일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月18日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 18일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十八]] [[zh:十月十八]] [[en:draft:October 18 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 18''' is the 18th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[文治]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1185]] [[November 11]] ） - [[Emperor Go-Shirakawa|後白河法皇]] が、[[Minamoto no Yoshitsune]] に[[源頼朝|頼朝]] 追討の院宣を下す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 11th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1568]] [[November 7]] ） - [[Oda Nobunaga]] に支援された[[Ashikaga Yoshiaki]] が[[Ashikaga Shogunate]] 第15代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] に就任 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[November 11]] ） - [[岩崎弥太郎]] が九十九商会を設立。後の[[三菱財閥|三菱商会]]
== Births == * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|Bunroku}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1595]] [[November 19]] ） - [[毛利秀就]] 、[[Chōshū Domain]] 第2代藩主（+ [[1651]] ） * 明治3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1870th year 11月11日） - [[鈴木大拙]] 、[[仏教]] [[Thinker]] （+ [[1966]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Keichō]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1602]] [[December 1]] ） - [[小早川秀秋]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1582]] ） * [[Keichō]] 15th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1610]] [[December 3]] ） - [[本多忠勝]] 、[[Daimyo]] ・[[徳川四天王]] の一人（* [[1548]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1710]] [[December 8]] ） - [[津軽信政]] 、[[弘前藩]] 主（* [[1646]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|17|10|19|9|18|11|10|1018}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[文治]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1185]] [[November 11]] ） - [[Emperor Go-Shirakawa|後白河法皇]] が、[[Minamoto no Yoshitsune]] に[[源頼朝|頼朝]] 追討の院宣を下す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 11th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1568]] [[November 7]] ） - [[Oda Nobunaga]] に支援された[[Ashikaga Yoshiaki]] が[[Ashikaga Shogunate]] 第15代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] に就任 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[November 11]] ） - [[岩崎弥太郎]] が九十九商会を設立。後の[[三菱財閥|三菱商会]]
== Births == * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|Bunroku}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1595]] [[November 19]] ） - [[毛利秀就]] 、[[Chōshū Domain]] 第2代藩主（+ [[1651]] ） * 明治3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1870th year 11月11日） - [[鈴木大拙]] 、[[仏教]] [[Thinker]] （+ [[1966]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Keichō]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1602]] [[December 1]] ） - [[小早川秀秋]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1582]] ） * [[Keichō]] 15th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1610]] [[December 3]] ） - [[本多忠勝]] 、[[Daimyo]] ・[[徳川四天王]] の一人（* [[1548]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1710]] [[December 8]] ） - [[津軽信政]] 、[[弘前藩]] 主（* [[1646]] ）

[[sn:October 18 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 18일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月18日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 18일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十八]] [[zh:十月十八]] [[en:draft:October 18 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 18''' is the 18th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[文治]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1185]] [[November 11]] ） - [[Emperor Go-Shirakawa|後白河法皇]] が、[[Minamoto no Yoshitsune]] に[[源頼朝|頼朝]] 追討の院宣を下す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 11th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1568]] [[November 7]] ） - [[Oda Nobunaga]] に支援された[[Ashikaga Yoshiaki]] が[[Ashikaga Shogunate]] 第15代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] に就任 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[November 11]] ） - [[岩崎弥太郎]] が九十九商会を設立。後の[[三菱財閥|三菱商会]]
== Births == * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|Bunroku}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1595]] [[November 19]] ） - [[毛利秀就]] 、[[Chōshū Domain]] 第2代藩主（+ [[1651]] ） * 明治3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1870th year 11月11日） - [[鈴木大拙]] 、[[仏教]] [[Thinker]] （+ [[1966]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Keichō]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1602]] [[December 1]] ） - [[小早川秀秋]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1582]] ） * [[Keichō]] 15th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1610]] [[December 3]] ） - [[本多忠勝]] 、[[Daimyo]] ・[[徳川四天王]] の一人（* [[1548]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1710]] [[December 8]] ） - [[津軽信政]] 、[[弘前藩]] 主（* [[1646]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|17|10|19|9|18|11|10|1018}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[文治]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1185]] [[November 11]] ） - [[Emperor Go-Shirakawa|後白河法皇]] が、[[Minamoto no Yoshitsune]] に[[源頼朝|頼朝]] 追討の院宣を下す{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 11th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1568]] [[November 7]] ） - [[Oda Nobunaga]] に支援された[[Ashikaga Yoshiaki]] が[[Ashikaga Shogunate]] 第15代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] に就任 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[November 11]] ） - [[岩崎弥太郎]] が九十九商会を設立。後の[[三菱財閥|三菱商会]]
== Births == * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|Bunroku}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1595]] [[November 19]] ） - [[毛利秀就]] 、[[Chōshū Domain]] 第2代藩主（+ [[1651]] ） * 明治3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1870th year 11月11日） - [[鈴木大拙]] 、[[仏教]] [[Thinker]] （+ [[1966]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Keichō]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1602]] [[December 1]] ） - [[小早川秀秋]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1582]] ） * [[Keichō]] 15th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1610]] [[December 3]] ） - [[本多忠勝]] 、[[Daimyo]] ・[[徳川四天王]] の一人（* [[1548]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1710]] [[December 8]] ） - [[津軽信政]] 、[[弘前藩]] 主（* [[1646]] ）

[[cdo:10 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十八]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 18''' is the 18th day of the month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|October (Old Calendar)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft}}, the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|Old Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|Rokuyō|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|Senbu|12=draft}}.
== Events == * [[文治]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1185]] [[November 11]]） – In the 1st year of the Bunji era, Emperor Go-Shirakawa issued an imperial decree ordering Minamoto no Yoshitsune to campaign against Minamoto no Yoritomo{{要出典|date=2021-03}}. * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 11th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1568]] [[November 7]]） – Ashikaga Yoshiaki, supported by Oda Nobunaga, was installed as the 15th shogun of the Ashikaga Shogunate. * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[November 11]]） – Yataro Iwasaki founded Tsukumo Shokai, the precursor to Mitsubishi.
== Births == * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|Bunroku|12=draft}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1595]] [[November 19]]） – Mōri Hidemasa, the 2nd lord of the Chōshū Domain (d. [[1651]]). * In the 3rd year of the Meiji era ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[November 11]]） – Daisetsu Suzuki, a Buddhist thinker (d. [[1966]]).
== Deaths == * [[Keichō]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1602]] [[December 1]]） – Kobayakawa Hideaki, a military commander (born [[1582]]). * [[Keichō]] 15th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1610]] [[December 3]]） – Honda Tadakatsu, a daimyo and one of the Four Heavenly Kings of Tokugawa (born [[1548]]). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|Hōei|12=draft}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1710]] [[December 8]]） – Tsugaru Nobumasa, lord of the Hirosaki Domain (born [[1646]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月18日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 18일]][[zh_min_nan:10 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十月十八]][[zh:十月十八]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840391]] Wikidata name: 18th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 18|qq=October 18}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 18일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 18''' is the 18th day of the month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|October (Old Calendar)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}, the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|Old Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|Rokuyō|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|Senbu|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Events == * [[:en:文治|文治]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1185|1185]] [[:en:November 11|November 11]]） – In the 1st year of the Bunji era, Emperor Go-Shirakawa issued an imperial decree ordering Minamoto no Yoshitsune to campaign against Minamoto no Yoritomo{{Citation needed|date=2021-03|qq=}}. * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 11th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1568|1568]] [[:en:November 7|November 7]]） – Ashikaga Yoshiaki, supported by Oda Nobunaga, was installed as the 15th shogun of the Ashikaga Shogunate. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:November 11|November 11]]） – Yataro Iwasaki founded Tsukumo Shokai, the precursor to Mitsubishi.
== Births == * [[Bunroku]]{{efn|Period of Japanese history (1592–1596)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1595|1595]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]]） – Mōri Hidemasa, the 2nd lord of the Chōshū Domain (d. [[:en:1651|1651]]). * In the 3rd year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:November 11|November 11]]） – Daisetsu Suzuki, a Buddhist thinker (d. [[:en:1966|1966]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1602|1602]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]]） – Kobayakawa Hideaki, a military commander (born [[:en:1582|1582]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1610|1610]] [[:en:December 3|December 3]]） – Honda Tadakatsu, a daimyo and one of the Four Heavenly Kings of Tokugawa (born [[:en:1548|1548]]). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|Hōei|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1710|1710]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]]） – Tsugaru Nobumasa, lord of the Hirosaki Domain (born [[:en:1646|1646]]).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 18일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 18''' is the 18th day of the month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|October (Old Calendar)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}, the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|Old Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|Rokuyō|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|Senbu|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Events == * [[:en:文治|文治]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1185|1185]] [[:en:November 11|November 11]]） – In the 1st year of the Bunji era, Emperor Go-Shirakawa issued an imperial decree ordering Minamoto no Yoshitsune to campaign against Minamoto no Yoritomo{{Citation needed|date=2021-03|qq=}}. * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 11th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1568|1568]] [[:en:November 7|November 7]]） – Ashikaga Yoshiaki, supported by Oda Nobunaga, was installed as the 15th shogun of the Ashikaga Shogunate. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:November 11|November 11]]） – Yataro Iwasaki founded Tsukumo Shokai, the precursor to Mitsubishi.
== Births == * [[Bunroku]]{{efn|Period of Japanese history (1592–1596)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1595|1595]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]]） – Mōri Hidemasa, the 2nd lord of the Chōshū Domain (d. [[:en:1651|1651]]). * In the 3rd year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:November 11|November 11]]） – Daisetsu Suzuki, a Buddhist thinker (d. [[:en:1966|1966]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1602|1602]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]]） – Kobayakawa Hideaki, a military commander (born [[:en:1582|1582]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1610|1610]] [[:en:December 3|December 3]]） – Honda Tadakatsu, a daimyo and one of the Four Heavenly Kings of Tokugawa (born [[:en:1548|1548]]). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|Hōei|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1710|1710]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]]） – Tsugaru Nobumasa, lord of the Hirosaki Domain (born [[:en:1646|1646]]).

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[d:" to "[[da:d:"
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月18日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 18일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月十八]][[zh:十月十八]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840391]] Wikidata name: 18th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 18|qq=October 18}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 18일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 18''' is the 18th day of the month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|October (Old Calendar)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}, the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|Old Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|Rokuyō|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|Senbu|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Events == * [[:en:文治|文治]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1185|1185]] [[:en:November 11|November 11]]） – In the 1st year of the Bunji era, Emperor Go-Shirakawa issued an imperial decree ordering Minamoto no Yoshitsune to campaign against Minamoto no Yoritomo{{Citation needed|date=2021-03|qq=}}. * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 11th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1568|1568]] [[:en:November 7|November 7]]） – Ashikaga Yoshiaki, supported by Oda Nobunaga, was installed as the 15th shogun of the Ashikaga Shogunate. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:November 11|November 11]]） – Yataro Iwasaki founded Tsukumo Shokai, the precursor to Mitsubishi.
== Births == * [[Bunroku]]{{efn|Period of Japanese history (1592–1596)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1595|1595]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]]） – Mōri Hidemasa, the 2nd lord of the Chōshū Domain (d. [[:en:1651|1651]]). * In the 3rd year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:November 11|November 11]]） – Daisetsu Suzuki, a Buddhist thinker (d. [[:en:1966|1966]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1602|1602]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]]） – Kobayakawa Hideaki, a military commander (born [[:en:1582|1582]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1610|1610]] [[:en:December 3|December 3]]） – Honda Tadakatsu, a daimyo and one of the Four Heavenly Kings of Tokugawa (born [[:en:1548|1548]]). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|Hōei|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1710|1710]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]]） – Tsugaru Nobumasa, lord of the Hirosaki Domain (born [[:en:1646|1646]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|17|10|19|9|18|11|10|1018|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 18일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 18''' is the 18th day of the month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|October (Old Calendar)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}, the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|Old Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|Rokuyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|Senbu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Events == * [[:en:文治|文治]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1185|1185]] [[:en:November 11|November 11]]） – In the 1st year of the Bunji era, Emperor Go-Shirakawa issued an imperial decree ordering Minamoto no Yoshitsune to campaign against Minamoto no Yoritomo{{Citation needed|date=2021-03|qq=}}. * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 11th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1568|1568]] [[:en:November 7|November 7]]） – Ashikaga Yoshiaki, supported by Oda Nobunaga, was installed as the 15th shogun of the Ashikaga Shogunate. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:November 11|November 11]]） – Yataro Iwasaki founded Tsukumo Shokai, the precursor to Mitsubishi.
== Births == * [[Bunroku]]{{efn|Period of Japanese history (1592–1596)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1595|1595]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]]） – Mōri Hidemasa, the 2nd lord of the Chōshū Domain (d. [[:en:1651|1651]]). * In the 3rd year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:November 11|November 11]]） – Daisetsu Suzuki, a Buddhist thinker (d. [[:en:1966|1966]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1602|1602]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]]） – Kobayakawa Hideaki, a military commander (born [[:en:1582|1582]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1610|1610]] [[:en:December 3|December 3]]） – Honda Tadakatsu, a daimyo and one of the Four Heavenly Kings of Tokugawa (born [[:en:1548|1548]]). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|Hōei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1710|1710]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]]） – Tsugaru Nobumasa, lord of the Hirosaki Domain (born [[:en:1646|1646]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|17|10|19|9|18|11|10|1018|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月18日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 18일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月十八]][[zh:十月十八]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840391]] Wikidata name: 18th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 18|qq=October 18}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 18일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 18''' is the 18th day of the month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|October (Old Calendar)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}, the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|Old Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|Rokuyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|Senbu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Events == * [[:en:文治|文治]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1185|1185]] [[:en:November 11|November 11]]） – In the 1st year of the Bunji era, Emperor Go-Shirakawa issued an imperial decree ordering Minamoto no Yoshitsune to campaign against Minamoto no Yoritomo{{Citation needed|date=2021-03|qq=}}. * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 11th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1568|1568]] [[:en:November 7|November 7]]） – Ashikaga Yoshiaki, supported by Oda Nobunaga, was installed as the 15th shogun of the Ashikaga Shogunate. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:November 11|November 11]]） – Yataro Iwasaki founded Tsukumo Shokai, the precursor to Mitsubishi.
== Births == * [[Bunroku]]{{efn|Period of Japanese history (1592–1596)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1595|1595]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]]） – Mōri Hidemasa, the 2nd lord of the Chōshū Domain (d. [[:en:1651|1651]]). * In the 3rd year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:November 11|November 11]]） – Daisetsu Suzuki, a Buddhist thinker (d. [[:en:1966|1966]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1602|1602]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]]） – Kobayakawa Hideaki, a military commander (born [[:en:1582|1582]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1610|1610]] [[:en:December 3|December 3]]） – Honda Tadakatsu, a daimyo and one of the Four Heavenly Kings of Tokugawa (born [[:en:1548|1548]]). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|Hōei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1710|1710]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]]） – Tsugaru Nobumasa, lord of the Hirosaki Domain (born [[:en:1646|1646]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|17|10|19|9|18|11|10|1018|qq=}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月18日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 18일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月十八]][[zh:十月十八]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840391]] Wikidata name: 18th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 18|qq=October 18}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 18일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 18''' is the 18th day of the month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|October (Old Calendar)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}, the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|Old Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|Rokuyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|Senbu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Events == * [[:en:文治|文治]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1185|1185]] [[:en:November 11|November 11]]） – In the 1st year of the Bunji era, Emperor Go-Shirakawa issued an imperial decree ordering Minamoto no Yoshitsune to campaign against Minamoto no Yoritomo{{Citation needed|date=2021-03|qq=}}. * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 11th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1568|1568]] [[:en:November 7|November 7]]） – Ashikaga Yoshiaki, supported by Oda Nobunaga, was installed as the 15th shogun of the Ashikaga Shogunate. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:November 11|November 11]]） – Yataro Iwasaki founded Tsukumo Shokai, the precursor to Mitsubishi.
== Births == * [[Bunroku]]{{efn|Period of Japanese history (1592–1596)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1595|1595]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]]） – Mōri Hidemasa, the 2nd lord of the Chōshū Domain (d. [[:en:1651|1651]]). * In the 3rd year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:November 11|November 11]]） – Daisetsu Suzuki, a Buddhist thinker (d. [[:en:1966|1966]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1602|1602]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]]） – Kobayakawa Hideaki, a military commander (born [[:en:1582|1582]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1610|1610]] [[:en:December 3|December 3]]） – Honda Tadakatsu, a daimyo and one of the Four Heavenly Kings of Tokugawa (born [[:en:1548|1548]]). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|Hōei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1710|1710]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]]） – Tsugaru Nobumasa, lord of the Hirosaki Domain (born [[:en:1646|1646]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|17|10|19|9|18|11|10|1018|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|10月18日 (旧暦)|version=82502870|comment=Imported full ja history}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵↵↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月18日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 18일]][[zh_min_nan:10 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十月十八]][[zh:十月十八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月18日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 18일]][[zh_min_nan:10 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十月十八]][[zh:十月十八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月18日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 18일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月十八]][[zh:十月十八]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840391]] Wikidata name: 18th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 18|qq=October 18}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 18일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 18''' is the 18th day of the month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|October (Old Calendar)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}, the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|Old Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|Rokuyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|Senbu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Events == * [[:en:文治|文治]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1185|1185]] [[:en:November 11|November 11]]） – In the 1st year of the Bunji era, Emperor Go-Shirakawa issued an imperial decree ordering Minamoto no Yoshitsune to campaign against Minamoto no Yoritomo{{Citation needed|date=2021-03|qq=}}. * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 11th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1568|1568]] [[:en:November 7|November 7]]） – Ashikaga Yoshiaki, supported by Oda Nobunaga, was installed as the 15th shogun of the Ashikaga Shogunate. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:November 11|November 11]]） – Yataro Iwasaki founded Tsukumo Shokai, the precursor to Mitsubishi.
== Births == * [[Bunroku]]{{efn|Period of Japanese history (1592–1596)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1595|1595]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]]） – Mōri Hidemasa, the 2nd lord of the Chōshū Domain (d. [[:en:1651|1651]]). * In the 3rd year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:November 11|November 11]]） – Daisetsu Suzuki, a Buddhist thinker (d. [[:en:1966|1966]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1602|1602]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]]） – Kobayakawa Hideaki, a military commander (born [[:en:1582|1582]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1610|1610]] [[:en:December 3|December 3]]） – Honda Tadakatsu, a daimyo and one of the Four Heavenly Kings of Tokugawa (born [[:en:1548|1548]]). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|Hōei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1710|1710]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]]） – Tsugaru Nobumasa, lord of the Hirosaki Domain (born [[:en:1646|1646]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|17|10|19|9|18|11|10|1018|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 18일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 18''' is the 18th day of the month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|October (Old Calendar)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}, the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|Old Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|Rokuyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|Senbu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Events == * [[:en:文治|文治]] 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1185|en|1185|WD=Q19729|lt=1185}} {{ill|November 11|en|November 11|WD=Q2987|lt=November 11}}） – In the 1st year of the Bunji era, Emperor Go-Shirakawa issued an imperial decree ordering Minamoto no Yoshitsune to campaign against Minamoto no Yoritomo{{Citation needed|date=2021-03|qq=}}. * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|WD=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku}} 11th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1568|en|1568|WD=Q6648|lt=1568}} {{ill|November 7|en|November 7|WD=Q2989|lt=November 7}}） – Ashikaga Yoshiaki, supported by Oda Nobunaga, was installed as the 15th shogun of the Ashikaga Shogunate. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1870|en|1870|WD=Q7741|lt=1870}} {{ill|November 11|en|November 11|WD=Q2987|lt=November 11}}） – Yataro Iwasaki founded Tsukumo Shokai, the precursor to Mitsubishi.
== Births == * [[Bunroku]]{{efn|Period of Japanese history (1592–1596)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1595|en|1595|WD=Q6782|lt=1595}} {{ill|November 19|en|November 19|WD=Q3026|lt=November 19}}） – Mōri Hidemasa, the 2nd lord of the Chōshū Domain (d. {{ill|1651|en|1651|WD=Q6956|lt=1651}}). * In the 3rd year of the Meiji era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1870|en|1870|WD=Q7741|lt=1870}} {{ill|November 11|en|November 11|WD=Q2987|lt=November 11}}） – Daisetsu Suzuki, a Buddhist thinker (d. {{ill|1966|en|1966|WD=Q2649|lt=1966}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1602|en|1602|WD=Q6727|lt=1602}} {{ill|December 1|en|December 1|WD=Q2297|lt=December 1}}） – Kobayakawa Hideaki, a military commander (born {{ill|1582|en|1582|WD=Q6719|lt=1582}}). * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1610|en|1610|WD=Q6765|lt=1610}} {{ill|December 3|en|December 3|WD=Q2298|lt=December 3}}） – Honda Tadakatsu, a daimyo and one of the Four Heavenly Kings of Tokugawa (born {{ill|1548|en|1548|WD=Q6551|lt=1548}}). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|Hōei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1710|en|1710|WD=Q6861|lt=1710}} {{ill|December 8|en|December 8|WD=Q2301|lt=December 8}}） – Tsugaru Nobumasa, lord of the Hirosaki Domain (born {{ill|1646|en|1646|WD=Q6930|lt=1646}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|17|10|19|9|18|11|10|1018|qq=}}

{{Not to be confused with|October 18|qq=October 18}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 18일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 18''' is the 18th day of the month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|October (Old Calendar)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}, the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|Old Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|Rokuyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|Senbu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Events == * [[:en:文治|文治]] 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1185|en|1185|WD=Q19729|lt=1185}} {{ill|November 11|en|November 11|WD=Q2987|lt=November 11}}） – In the 1st year of the Bunji era, Emperor Go-Shirakawa issued an imperial decree ordering Minamoto no Yoshitsune to campaign against Minamoto no Yoritomo{{Citation needed|date=2021-03|qq=}}. * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|WD=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku}} 11th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1568|en|1568|WD=Q6648|lt=1568}} {{ill|November 7|en|November 7|WD=Q2989|lt=November 7}}） – Ashikaga Yoshiaki, supported by Oda Nobunaga, was installed as the 15th shogun of the Ashikaga Shogunate. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1870|en|1870|WD=Q7741|lt=1870}} {{ill|November 11|en|November 11|WD=Q2987|lt=November 11}}） – Yataro Iwasaki founded Tsukumo Shokai, the precursor to Mitsubishi.
== Births == * [[Bunroku]]{{efn|Period of Japanese history (1592–1596)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1595|en|1595|WD=Q6782|lt=1595}} {{ill|November 19|en|November 19|WD=Q3026|lt=November 19}}） – Mōri Hidemasa, the 2nd lord of the Chōshū Domain (d. {{ill|1651|en|1651|WD=Q6956|lt=1651}}). * In the 3rd year of the Meiji era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1870|en|1870|WD=Q7741|lt=1870}} {{ill|November 11|en|November 11|WD=Q2987|lt=November 11}}） – Daisetsu Suzuki, a Buddhist thinker (d. {{ill|1966|en|1966|WD=Q2649|lt=1966}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1602|en|1602|WD=Q6727|lt=1602}} {{ill|December 1|en|December 1|WD=Q2297|lt=December 1}}） – Kobayakawa Hideaki, a military commander (born {{ill|1582|en|1582|WD=Q6719|lt=1582}}). * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1610|en|1610|WD=Q6765|lt=1610}} {{ill|December 3|en|December 3|WD=Q2298|lt=December 3}}） – Honda Tadakatsu, a daimyo and one of the Four Heavenly Kings of Tokugawa (born {{ill|1548|en|1548|WD=Q6551|lt=1548}}). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|Hōei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1710|en|1710|WD=Q6861|lt=1710}} {{ill|December 8|en|December 8|WD=Q2301|lt=December 8}}） – Tsugaru Nobumasa, lord of the Hirosaki Domain (born {{ill|1646|en|1646|WD=Q6930|lt=1646}}).

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|Rokuyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|Senbu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Events == * [[:en:文治|文治]] 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1185|en|1185|WD=Q19729|lt=1185}} {{ill|November 11|en|November 11|WD=Q2987|lt=November 11}}） – In the 1st year of the Bunji era, Emperor Go-Shirakawa issued an imperial decree ordering Minamoto no Yoshitsune to campaign against Minamoto no Yoritomo{{Citation needed|date=2021-03|qq=}}. * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|WD=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku}} 11th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1568|en|1568|WD=Q6648|lt=1568}} {{ill|November 7|en|November 7|WD=Q2989|lt=November 7}}） – Ashikaga Yoshiaki, supported by Oda Nobunaga, was installed as the 15th shogun of the Ashikaga Shogunate. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1870|en|1870|WD=Q7741|lt=1870}} {{ill|November 11|en|November 11|WD=Q2987|lt=November 11}}） – Yataro Iwasaki founded Tsukumo Shokai, the precursor to Mitsubishi.
== Births == * [[Bunroku]]{{efn|Period of Japanese history (1592–1596)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1595|en|1595|WD=Q6782|lt=1595}} {{ill|November 19|en|November 19|WD=Q3026|lt=November 19}}） – Mōri Hidemasa, the 2nd lord of the Chōshū Domain (d. {{ill|1651|en|1651|WD=Q6956|lt=1651}}). * In the 3rd year of the Meiji era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1870|en|1870|WD=Q7741|lt=1870}} {{ill|November 11|en|November 11|WD=Q2987|lt=November 11}}） – Daisetsu Suzuki, a Buddhist thinker (d. {{ill|1966|en|1966|WD=Q2649|lt=1966}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1602|en|1602|WD=Q6727|lt=1602}} {{ill|December 1|en|December 1|WD=Q2297|lt=December 1}}） – Kobayakawa Hideaki, a military commander (born {{ill|1582|en|1582|WD=Q6719|lt=1582}}). * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1610|en|1610|WD=Q6765|lt=1610}} {{ill|December 3|en|December 3|WD=Q2298|lt=December 3}}） – Honda Tadakatsu, a daimyo and one of the Four Heavenly Kings of Tokugawa (born {{ill|1548|en|1548|WD=Q6551|lt=1548}}). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|Hōei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1710|en|1710|WD=Q6861|lt=1710}} {{ill|December 8|en|December 8|WD=Q2301|lt=December 8}}） – Tsugaru Nobumasa, lord of the Hirosaki Domain (born {{ill|1646|en|1646|WD=Q6930|lt=1646}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|17|10|19|9|18|11|10|1018|qq=}}

== Events == * [[:en:文治|文治]] 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1185|en|1185|WD=Q19729|lt=1185|1=1185}} {{ill|November 11|en|November 11|WD=Q2987|lt=November 11|1=November 11}}） – In the 1st year of the Bunji era, Emperor Go-Shirakawa issued an imperial decree ordering Minamoto no Yoshitsune to campaign against Minamoto no Yoritomo{{Citation needed|date=2021-03|qq=}}. * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|WD=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} 11th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1568|en|1568|WD=Q6648|lt=1568|1=1568}} {{ill|November 7|en|November 7|WD=Q2989|lt=November 7|1=November 7}}） – Ashikaga Yoshiaki, supported by Oda Nobunaga, was installed as the 15th shogun of the Ashikaga Shogunate. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji|1=Meiji era}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1870|en|1870|WD=Q7741|lt=1870|1=1870}} {{ill|November 11|en|November 11|WD=Q2987|lt=November 11|1=November 11}}） – Yataro Iwasaki founded Tsukumo Shokai, the precursor to Mitsubishi.
== Births == * [[Bunroku]]{{efn|Period of Japanese history (1592–1596)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1595|en|1595|WD=Q6782|lt=1595|1=1595}} {{ill|November 19|en|November 19|WD=Q3026|lt=November 19|1=November 19}}） – Mōri Hidemasa, the 2nd lord of the Chōshū Domain (d. {{ill|1651|en|1651|WD=Q6956|lt=1651|1=1651}}). * In the 3rd year of the Meiji era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1870|en|1870|WD=Q7741|lt=1870|1=1870}} {{ill|November 11|en|November 11|WD=Q2987|lt=November 11|1=November 11}}） – Daisetsu Suzuki, a Buddhist thinker (d. {{ill|1966|en|1966|WD=Q2649|lt=1966|1=1966}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1602|en|1602|WD=Q6727|lt=1602|1=1602}} {{ill|December 1|en|December 1|WD=Q2297|lt=December 1|1=December 1}}） – Kobayakawa Hideaki, a military commander (born {{ill|1582|en|1582|WD=Q6719|lt=1582|1=1582}}). * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1610|en|1610|WD=Q6765|lt=1610|1=1610}} {{ill|December 3|en|December 3|WD=Q2298|lt=December 3|1=December 3}}） – Honda Tadakatsu, a daimyo and one of the Four Heavenly Kings of Tokugawa (born {{ill|1548|en|1548|WD=Q6551|lt=1548|1=1548}}). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|Hōei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1710|en|1710|WD=Q6861|lt=1710|1=1710}} {{ill|December 8|en|December 8|WD=Q2301|lt=December 8|1=December 8}}） – Tsugaru Nobumasa, lord of the Hirosaki Domain (born {{ill|1646|en|1646|WD=Q6930|lt=1646|1=1646}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|17|10|19|9|18|11|10|1018|qq=}}
